events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed the scenario as a **pass** — the pre-task photos and signed briefing show the required guards, access control, and crew protection already in place per the lift plan, with no active exposure visible. I wrote the findings/actions to `/app/answer.json`, noting the caveat that this snapshot only covers the pre-task state, so controls (exclusion zone, load chart verification, ground/outrigger support) should be re-confirmed once hoisting actually begins.
